title: Fix: .html rewrite breaks 404 page on docs-site
description:
The .html→clean rewrite I added in commit 6f9e387 also strips /404.html, which is the target of `error_page 404 /404.html`. Result: every legit 404 returns 301 → /404 → 200 instead of a clean 404, which Google reads as a soft 404.

Verified via curl on prod 2026-04-30:
- https://docs.torale.ai/api/admin → 301 → /404
- https://docs.torale.ai/404.html → 301 → /404  (THIS is the smoking gun)
- https://docs.torale.ai/404 → 200

Fix: exclude 404.html from the .html-stripping rewrite. Either:
- `rewrite ^/(?!404\\.html$)(.+)\\.html$ /$1 permanent;` (negative lookahead)
- Or use a separate location block

Currently affecting: any URL Google has cached that no longer exists in docs (~33 pages per GSC 'Not found' bucket per screenshot). All produce soft 404s instead of clean 404s, hurting Google's ability to deindex cleanly.

Branch: same as torale-oja (fix/seo-html-duplicates-and-leaks-2)
acceptance_criteria: curl -I docs.torale.ai/api/admin returns 404 (not 301); /404.html returns 200 with 404 status; .html→clean redirect still works for legit pages

title: Investigate brand 'torale' CTR collapse (~0% at avg pos 3)
description:
Lifetime brand-query data is catastrophic: 487 'torale' impressions over 5 months, only 3 clicks. 0.62% CTR at avg position 3. Industry baseline at pos 3 is ~10-15%.

Monthly breakdown:
- 2025-12: 98 imps, 0 clicks, 0.00% CTR, pos 2.86
- 2026-01: 120 imps, 1 click, 0.83%, pos 2.88
- 2026-02: 72 imps, 0 clicks, 0.00%, pos 3.94
- 2026-03: 99 imps, 2 clicks, 2.02%, pos 7.43
- 2026-04: 98 imps, 0 clicks, 0.00%, pos 3.37

This is NOT a structural SEO problem — PR #216 won't fix it. Likely causes:
1. SERP snippet (title/description) doesn't match brand intent
2. Another result captures the click (Twitter/X profile? GitHub org? a competitor with similar name?)
3. Brand confusion — searches for 'torale' might be typos of unrelated terms (queries also showed: orticale, thorale, toraleo, troale)
4. Knowledge panel or sitelinks issue

Action: manually search 'torale' on Google. Screenshot the SERP. Identify what ranks above + what's between impression and click. Inspect the rendered snippet on the homepage. Decide on fix path (rewrite homepage title/meta description? Add structured data? Schema.org Organization? Submit to Google Knowledge Panel?).

NOT in scope of fix/seo-html-duplicates-and-leaks branch.

Audit reference: notes-vault/torale/seo-audit-followup-2026-04-30.md (Problem 2)

title: Fix .html duplicate content on docs.torale.ai
description:
docs-site/nginx.conf:39-41 has `try_files $uri $uri/index.html $uri.html =404;` which serves /foo and /foo.html both as 200. Verified live with curl on 2026-04-30: both URLs return 200 with identical content and identical canonical tag (clean URL).

Despite the canonical tag pointing to the clean form, Google has historically chosen .html as canonical on every duplicate pair. Lifetime GSC data:
- architecture/temporal-workflows: 157 imps @ pos 8.4 (.html) vs 124 @ 10.1 (clean)
- architecture/grounded-search: 61 @ 21.4 (.html) vs 31 @ 68.1 (clean)
- api/overview: 38 @ 6.4 (.html) vs 1 @ 5.0 (clean)
- ~15 docs URLs affected total, splitting search authority

Fix: add `rewrite ^/(.+)\\.html$ /$1 permanent;` immediately below the existing trailing-slash rewrite at docs-site/nginx.conf:28. Leave try_files alone — VitePress builds <route>.html files on disk and the fallback is needed for internal serving after the URL is canonicalized.

Branch: fix/seo-html-duplicates-and-leaks
Audit reference: notes-vault/torale/seo-audit-followup-2026-04-30.md
acceptance_criteria: curl -I docs.torale.ai/api/overview.html returns 301 to /api/overview; curl -I clean URL returns 200; sitemap resubmitted in GSC; 2-week soak shows googleCanonical flips to clean form on 3 sample URLs
notes: Merged to main as commit 6f9e387 on 2026-04-30 (fast-forward). Branch deleted local + remote. CI production.yml will deploy. Verification handoff: torale-rnk (2-week audit rerun).
close_reason: Fix landed on branch fix/seo-html-duplicates-and-leaks, commit 6f9e387. Local docker test confirms: .html URLs 301 to clean form, clean URLs return 200, trailing-slash redirect still works (no regression), 410 paths still 410 via two-hop redirect. Awaiting merge + 2-week verification (torale-rnk).

title: Fix .html duplicate content on docs.torale.ai
description: docs-site/nginx.conf:40 has `try_files $uri $uri/index.html $uri.html =404;` — the $uri.html fallback means /api/overview and /api/overview.html both return 200 with identical content. Verified live: both serve identical canonical tag (clean URL), but Google has historically chosen the .html variant as canonical (e.g. architecture/temporal-workflows: 157 imps @ pos 8.4 on .html vs 124 @ 10.1 on clean). Fix: add `rewrite ^/(.+)\\.html$ /$1 permanent;` before try_files, or remove the $uri.html fallback. Then resubmit docs sitemap. Affects ~15 docs URLs splitting search authority.

title: Refresh CLAUDE.md: drop tree, add graphify pointer, fix stale paths
description: CLAUDE.md drifted: agent entry path wrong (agent.py vs server.py), MonitoringResponse path wrong, two non-existent doc paths, LLM stack phrased inconsistently, backend tree shows 3 of 15 subdirs, skills section lists 2 of 4. Plan: drop the rotting ASCII tree, replace with service entrypoint map; add explicit Graphify section so cross-cutting questions query the graph instead of grepping; fix stack phrasing to 'Gemini + tools (Perplexity, Parallel, browser, MCP)'; fix MonitoringResponse + agent server paths; remove dead doc rows.

title: /settings/connectors page with ConnectorCard grid
description: Settings page for managing connector connections. ConnectorCard grid plus degradation banner on task detail when an attached connector is no longer ACTIVE. Landed in PR #219.

title: Connected Tools picker in Task Creation/Edit dialogs
description: TaskCreationDialog and TaskEditDialog gain a 'Connected Tools' picker section for attaching connectors per task. Landed in PR #219.

title: Per-run MCP toolset assembly in torale-agent
description: Pydantic AI assembles per-run MCP toolset from A2A metadata. Uses pre-configured httpx.AsyncClient(follow_redirects=True) to follow Composio's 307 to /v3/mcp/{id}/mcp. Live-tested with Gemini calling NOTION_SEARCH_NOTION_PAGE. Landed in PR #219.

title: tasks.attached_connector_slugs + scheduler MCP resolution
description: Add per-task connector slug array; scheduler intersects with user's ACTIVE connectors at run time and passes MCP servers via A2A metadata. Landed in PR #219.

title: Connectors REST endpoints + callback page
description: /api/v1/connectors/* (available, list, connect, delete, callback) plus backend-rendered HTML callback page so the OAuth tab needs no Clerk roundtrip. Landed in PR #219.

title: user_connectors table + ActivityStep connector fields
description: Add user_connectors table; ActivityStep gains connector_slug + annotations columns. Landed in PR #219.

title: Async Composio client wrapper
description: Thin async wrapper over Composio SDK with Pydantic return types. SDK calls run in asyncio.to_thread to avoid blocking the event loop. Landed in PR #219.

title: Composio toolkit registry + seed script
description: Seeds Notion/Linear/GitHub auth configs and MCP servers in the dev Composio project; commits resulting IDs as the toolkit registry. Landed in PR #219.

title: Fix MobileNav never rendering (hiddenPaths includes '/')
description:
MobileNav.tsx returns null on every page because hiddenPaths.some(p => location.pathname.startsWith(p)) has '/' in hiddenPaths. Every path startsWith('/'), so the bottom mobile nav has never rendered since it shipped in commit fc688e5 ('feat: next-gen design system and documentation overhaul (#94)', ~2025-12-02). ~4.5 months of no mobile nav.

User symptom: on mobile, Settings button is unreachable from the bottom nav. Workaround: desktop Header's icon-only Bell/Settings is still technically visible at mobile widths but tiny and unlabeled.

Scope: standalone fix, not bundled with custom-connectors PR #219. Pre-existing bug, not a regression.
acceptance_criteria:
- MobileNav renders on /dashboard, /tasks/:id, /settings/notifications, /admin, /explore on mobile viewports
- MobileNav still hidden on /, /sign-in, /sign-up, /waitlist, /changelog
- Manual mobile viewport check (Playwright or DevTools device emulation)
- No regressions on desktop (MobileNav should already be display:none via responsive CSS)
notes:
File: frontend/src/components/MobileNav.tsx
Introduced: fc688e5 (#94, ~2025-12-02)
Fix proposed by: torale.feat-custom-connectors-2 peer
Tags: mobile, nav, frontend

title: Re-run SEO audit (2-week followup after .html fix deploy)
description:
Two weeks after the .html duplicates fix deploys to docs.torale.ai, re-run the audit using the methodology from notes-vault/torale/seo-audit-followup-2026-04-30.md.

Specifically:
1. GOOGLE_SEARCH_CONSOLE_INSPECT_URL on the 3 sample duplicate-pair URLs (architecture/temporal-workflows, api/overview, sdk/quickstart) — expect googleCanonical to have flipped to clean form
2. GOOGLE_SEARCH_CONSOLE_SEARCH_ANALYTICS_QUERY for new period vs prior period — check if .html variants are losing impressions and clean URLs gaining
3. Re-inspect /changelog and /privacy — expect them to have flipped to non-slash canonical
4. Compare overall impression trend

Write findings to notes-vault/torale/seo-audit-followup-<date>.md.

Depends on: html-duplicates fix being deployed.

title: GSC: submit distill-alternative + changetower-alternative for indexing
description:
Two compare pages exist in sitemap-static.xml but have ZERO lifetime impressions — Google never discovered them. Manual submission needed to kick off crawl.

Action: GSC > URL Inspection > Request Indexing for:
- https://torale.ai/compare/distill-alternative
- https://torale.ai/compare/changetower-alternative

Audit reference: notes-vault/torale/seo-audit-followup-2026-04-30.md (Problem 4)

title: GSC: request reindex for /changelog and /privacy
description:
Both pages still indexed under their pre-merge slash form (/changelog/, /privacy/). Last crawls 2026-04-07 and 2026-04-14 respectively (pre PR #216 merge). nginx 301s are correct; just waiting for Google to recrawl. Manual reindex in GSC UI bypasses the wait.

Action: open GSC > URL Inspection > paste URL > Request Indexing for:
- https://torale.ai/changelog
- https://torale.ai/privacy

GSC API doesn't expose urlNotifications.publish, this is UI-only.

Audit reference: notes-vault/torale/seo-audit-followup-2026-04-30.md (Problem 3)

title: Activity trail MCP branding (tool icons + connector badges)
description: Render connector-specific tool icons and badges in agent activity trail. Activity currently renders correctly via the generic fallback. Filed as follow-up from PR #219 (was torale-krx on the branch).

title: Composio expiry webhook handler
description: Handle Composio webhooks for connection expiry events. Connections currently transition to EXPIRED naturally on next run; webhook is an optimization to flip state immediately.
notes: Deferred from PR #219 (was torale-785 on the branch).
